name: Cauliflower Slaw with Creamy Dill Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cauliflower into small florets.
2. Steam the florets until they are still firm and crunchy but lose their raw taste: about 3-4 minutes. Run under cool water to stop cooking, then drain.
3. Chop the florets coarsely. Add the other vegetables and enough Creamy Dill Dressing to coat.
